claim.summary: Live-vLLM delegated queue completed a broader ordinary workspace task-bank sweep after adding exact workspace-contract direct routing and fixing a bad bundled tooling command.

focused_tests.command: /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python -m py_compile agent_kernel/extensions/policy_workflow_adapter.py agent_kernel/policy.py tests/test_policy.py tests/test_task_generation.py && /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_policy.py::test_llm_policy_workspace_contract_uses_exact_contract_before_context_compile tests/test_policy.py::test_llm_policy_workspace_contract_stages_exact_long_horizon_sequence_before_context_compile tests/test_policy.py::test_llm_policy_shared_repo_worker_uses_contract_command_before_context_compile tests/test_policy.py::test_llm_policy_explicit_shared_repo_worker_uses_contract_command_before_context_compile tests/test_policy.py::test_llm_policy_shared_repo_integrator_skips_context_compile_for_first_merge_segment && /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_task_generation.py::test_tooling_release_contract_suggested_sequence_satisfies_contract tests/test_policy.py::test_llm_policy_workspace_contract_stages_exact_long_horizon_sequence_before_context_compile
focused_tests.result: passed: py_compile clean; 5 focused policy tests passed in 80.64s; 2 tooling/task-bank focused tests passed in 15.53s

code_changes: Added workspace_contract_direct pre-context routing for ordinary non-retrieval, non-shared-repo workspace tasks with exact suggested commands.
Added staged exact-command handling for long-horizon workspace contracts such as tooling_release_contract_task.
Fixed the bundled tooling_release_contract_task replay.sh suggested command and success-command shell quoting.

superseded_negative_evidence.reason: The bundled suggested command for scripts/replay.sh was shell-quoted incorrectly before the task-bank fix; the controller executed the exact staged contract sequence, but the command did not produce verifier-expected content.

open_limits: This packet broadens ordinary workspace task coverage, but it is still task-bank bounded evidence, not full production-duty A5.
The packet does not replace the r5+r6 required-family shared-repo repeated-control packet; it complements it by addressing the r7 ordinary workspace failure mode.
A stronger full A5 claim still needs longer-duration persistent role operation, repeated interruption/resume, and broader non-fixture production workloads.
